---
title: "Population Exposure over Time"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include _pop_setup.qmd >}}



```{r pop_over_time, fig.height = 8, fig.width = 8}
pop <- read_csv(here('data/processed/pop_affected.csv')) %>%
  rename(
    wildfire_year = year,
    `Population Affected` = exposed_10km,
    usfs_region = region
  ) %>%
  select(-ID_hazard)

pop_labels <- pop %>%
  left_join(REGION_ORDER) %>%
  mutate(
    tot = sum(
      `Population Affected`,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region, plot_order, tot) %>%
  reframe(
    label_abs = paste0(
      usfs_region,
      ' (',
      scales::comma(
        mean(
          `Population Affected`,
          na.rm = TRUE
        )
      ),
      ')'
    ),
    label_rel = paste0(
      usfs_region,
      ' (',
      scales::percent(
        sum(
          `Population Affected`,
          na.rm = TRUE
        ) /
          tot,
        accuracy = .1
      ),
      ')'
    )
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(label_abs = fct_reorder(label_abs, plot_order)) %>%
  mutate(label_rel = fct_reorder(label_rel, plot_order))

pop <- pop %>% left_join(pop_labels)

names(region_colors) <- sort(as.character(pop_labels$label_abs))

p_abs <- ggplot(data = pop) +
  geom_col(
    aes(
      x = wildfire_year,
      y = `Population Affected`,
      fill = label_abs
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.25,
    color = 'grey25'
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Region (Overall Annual Mean)",
    values = region_colors
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(2000, 2024, by = 2),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  #    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(2000, 2025)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  xlab(NULL) +
  ylab('Population Affected') +
  pop_theme +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = 'grey75'),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = 'grey90'),
    legend.position = 'right' #,
    #plot.margin = unit(c(1, 5, 1, 5), "cm"),
  )

names(region_colors) <- sort(as.character(pop_labels$label_rel))

p_rel <- ggplot(data = pop) +
  geom_col(
    aes(
      x = wildfire_year,
      y = `Population Affected`,
      fill = label_rel
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.25,
    color = 'grey25',
    position = position_fill()
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Region (Overall Share)", values = region_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(2000, 2024, by = 2),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
    labels = scales::percent
  ) +
  xlab(NULL) +
  ylab(glue("Population Affected (Share of Total)")) +
  pop_theme +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = 'grey75'),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = 'grey90'),
    legend.position = 'right' #,
    #plot.margin = unit(c(1, 5, 1, 5), "cm"),
  )

p <- p_abs + plot_spacer() + p_rel + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(5, 1, 5))
p
ggsave(here('figures/pop_over_time.pdf'), last_plot(), width = 8, height = 8)
```
